entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple filerz/server maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 20, 06:00 UTC  -  Apr 23, 23:00 UTC

Apr 8, 13:57 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 20/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/04/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : Concerned filerz/server will be temporarily unavailable for 30 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update for the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

List of concerned Filerz:

- filerz804 Cluster129 : 20/04/2026 08:00 UTC
- filerz93 Cluster123 : 20/04/2026 08:30 UTC
- filerz957 Cluster129 : 20/04/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz129 Cluster123 : 21/04/2026 08:00 UTC
- filerz140 Cluster126 : 21/04/2026 08:30 UTC
- filerz172 Cluster126 : 21/04/2026 22:00 UTC
- filerz935 Cluster128 : 21/04/2026 22:30 UTC
- filerz56 Cluster123 : 22/04/2026 08:00 UTC
- server1606 Cluster131 : 22/04/2026 08:30 UTC
- server1654 Cluster131 : 22/04/2026 22:00 UTC
- server1671 Cluster131 : 22/04/2026 22:30 UTC
- server1612 Cluster128 : 23/04/2026 08:00 UTC
- server1550 Cluster129 : 23/04/2026 07:30 UTC
- server1011 Cluster130 : 23/04/2026 08:30 UTC
- server1564 Cluster130 : 23/04/2026 22:00 UTC
- server1598 Cluster131 : 23/04/2026 22:30 UTC
- filerz986 Cluster128 : 23/04/2026 23:00 UTC

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - [Clusters 129/123/121/127] Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 16, 06:00 - 21:30 UTC

Apr 2, 15:30 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 16/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/04/2026 21:30 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- Filerz 1046 CLusters 129 / 16/04/2026 06:00
- Filerz 141 CLusters 123 / 16/04/2026 06:30
- Filerz 271 CLusters 127 / 16/04/2026 20:30
- Filerz 364 CLusters 121 / 16/04/2026 21:00


Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the various systems.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster126 - Filerz215 incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 10, 14:15 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on our Web Hosting offer on Cluster126 - Filerz215 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/04/2026 09:45 UTC
End time : 10/04/2026 13:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz215 was facing some disturbances on Web Hosting Cluster126.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their websites during the disturbances that lasted a few minutes.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 9, 12:02 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions on MX Plan has been resolved.

Start time : 09/04/2026 05:30 UTC
End time : 09/04/2026 11:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 9, 09:34 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on MX Plan.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/04/2026 05:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan mailbox is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their mailbox.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Apr 9, 07:45 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing a global temporary availability issue.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/04/2026 05:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan mailbox is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their mailbox.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [FR][Internet Access] - FTTH incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 7, 11:36 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Internet Access offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/04/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 07/04/2026 10:40 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 7, 09:49 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Internet Access offering.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 07/04/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Connectivity of FTTH access is temporarily unavailable. It is recommended not to restart your modem.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Apr 7, 09:06 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Internet Access offering, which is causing temporary availability issue

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/04/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Connectivity of FTTH access is temporarily unavailable. It is recommended not to restart your modem.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [Global][Domains] - incident notification on .DK domains name
entry.content:
Apr 7, 07:04 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our Domains, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 07/04/2026 06:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .DK domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete).
Please note that websites are still available.
Unfortunately, customers who want to renew their .DKdomains name after the expiration date is already passed will have their websites unavailable.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Our teams are fully engaged and working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Email delivery incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 3, 12:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
End time : 03/04/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 11:53 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Services are being gradually restored, but the customer impact is still ongoing.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams remain fully engaged to reinstate the remaining services as soon as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 08:49 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Customers using the Zimbra and EmailPro services are also affected by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 08:49 UTC
Identified - Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail-out service temporarily degraded.
Customers Impact : Delay or failure in sending customer's emails. Deliveries to specific destinations may be particularly impacted (e.g., Gmail, Orange, or hosted Exchange services).
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 07:46 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue on MX Plan delivery services.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail-out service temporarily degraded.
Customers Impact : Delay or failure in sending customer's emails. Deliveries to specific destinations may be particularly impacted (e.g., Gmail, Orange, or hosted Exchange services).
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Customers Impact : Customers using cluster121 may have temporarily experienced latency on their websites.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and corrected. It is being closely monitored to ensure long-term stability.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
